requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Standard PS/IEC 60335-2-40 — Heat Pumps, Air Conditioners, and Voltage / Frequency Alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全标准 PS/IEC 60335-2-40——热泵、空调器及电压/频率适配
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全標準 PS/IEC 60335-2-40——熱泵、空調器及電壓/頻率適配

summary.en: Pakistan adopts Pakistan Standards (PS) harmonised with IEC base standards for electrical safety. Heat pumps and air conditioners must comply with PS/IEC 60335-2-40 (particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers) and the general requirements under PS/IEC 60335-1. The PSQCA PS Mark process requires conformity to the applicable PS standard. Pakistan's mains supply is 230 V (single-phase) and 400 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz. Chinese equipment rated at 220 V / 50 Hz generally operates within the ±10% voltage tolerance (198-242 V for CN-rated units), but rated-voltage marking, nameplate, and installation compatibility must be verified for the specific Pakistan supply voltage. Wiring, plugs, sockets, and installation requirements follow Pakistan national standards.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦采用与IEC基础标准协调的巴基斯坦标准（PS）作为电气安全标准。热泵和空调器须符合PS/IEC 60335-2-40（热泵、空调器及除湿机特定要求）及PS/IEC 60335-1通用要求。PSQCA PS Mark流程要求符合适用的PS标准。巴基斯坦电网供电为230 V（单相）和400 V（三相），频率50 Hz。额定220 V / 50 Hz的中国设备通常在±10%电压容差范围内运行（对于中国额定机型为198-242 V），但须针对巴基斯坦具体供电电压核实额定电压标识、铭牌和安装兼容性。接线、插头、插座及安装要求遵循巴基斯坦国家标准。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦採用與IEC基礎標準協調的巴基斯坦標準（PS）作為電氣安全標準。熱泵和空調器須符合PS/IEC 60335-2-40（熱泵、空調器及除濕機特定要求）及PS/IEC 60335-1通用要求。PSQCA PS Mark流程要求符合適用的PS標準。巴基斯坦電網供電為230 V（單相）和400 V（三相），頻率50 Hz。額定220 V / 50 Hz的中國設備通常在±10%電壓容差範圍內運行（對於中國額定機型為198-242 V），但須針對巴基斯坦具體供電電壓核實額定電壓標識、銘牌和安裝相容性。接線、插頭、插座及安裝要求遵循巴基斯坦國家標準。

standards_or_laws: PS/IEC 60335-2-40 (Pakistan Standard: heat pumps, air conditioners, dehumidifiers)
PSQCA mandatory PS Mark certification process
Pakistan national grid: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's safety standard for heat pumps and air conditioners is GB 4706.32 (household and similar electrical appliances — particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers), derived from IEC 60335-2-40 with Chinese deviations. Chinese equipment is rated for 220 V / 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency eliminates frequency-conversion concerns; however, China's nominal 220 V is 10 V lower than Pakistan's 230 V — both fall within the ±10% operating tolerance of most inverter-drive units, but nameplate markings, component ratings, and safety test evidence must reflect the Pakistan supply voltage. CCC certification to GB 4706.32 does not substitute PS Mark under PS/IEC 60335-2-40.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调器的安全标准为GB 4706.32（家用和类似用途电器——热泵、空调器和除湿机特殊要求），源自IEC 60335-2-40并含中国偏差。中国设备额定电压为220 V / 50 Hz。相同的50 Hz频率消除了频率转换问题；但中国标称220 V比巴基斯坦230 V低10 V——两者均在大多数变频设备±10%运行容差范围内，但铭牌标识、元器件额定值和安全测试证据须反映巴基斯坦供电电压。基于GB 4706.32的CCC认证不能替代PS/IEC 60335-2-40下的PS Mark。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調器的安全標準為GB 4706.32（家用和類似用途電器——熱泵、空調器和除濕機特殊要求），源自IEC 60335-2-40並含中國偏差。中國設備額定電壓為220 V / 50 Hz。相同的50 Hz頻率消除了頻率轉換問題；但中國標稱220 V比巴基斯坦230 V低10 V——兩者均在大多數變頻設備±10%運行容差範圍內，但銘牌標識、元器件額定值和安全測試證據須反映巴基斯坦供電電壓。基於GB 4706.32的CCC認證不能替代PS/IEC 60335-2-40下的PS Mark。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 (heat pumps, air conditioners, dehumidifiers — China safety standard)

gap.en: The 50 Hz grid frequency is identical between China and Pakistan, removing frequency-related gaps. The 10 V nominal voltage difference (220 V CN vs. 230 V PK) is within ±10% tolerance for most inverter-type units, but exporters must confirm component ratings, nameplate voltage declarations, and safety test evidence cover the Pakistan 230 V supply. Test reports must reference PS/IEC 60335-2-40 (not only GB 4706.32) to support the PSQCA PS Mark application. Plug and wiring configurations must also conform to Pakistan standards.
gap.zh: 中国与巴基斯坦电网频率同为50 Hz，消除了频率相关差距。10 V标称电压差（中国220 V对巴基斯坦230 V）对大多数变频机型在±10%容差范围内，但出口商须确认元器件额定值、铭牌电压声明和安全测试证据涵盖巴基斯坦230 V供电。测试报告须引用PS/IEC 60335-2-40（而非仅GB 4706.32），以支持PSQCA PS Mark申请。插头和接线配置也须符合巴基斯坦标准。
gap.zht: 中國與巴基斯坦電網頻率同為50 Hz，消除了頻率相關差距。10 V標稱電壓差（中國220 V對巴基斯坦230 V）對大多數變頻機型在±10%容差範圍內，但出口商須確認元器件額定值、銘牌電壓聲明和安全測試證據涵蓋巴基斯坦230 V供電。測試報告須引用PS/IEC 60335-2-40（而非僅GB 4706.32），以支持PSQCA PS Mark申請。插頭和接線配置也須符合巴基斯坦標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PS/IEC 60335-2-40 conformity required for PSQCA PS Mark; 230 V 50 Hz supply applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic Chinese market under GB 4706.32 and CCC; IEC base standard shared but Chinese deviations and CCC not equivalent to PS Mark

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moderate gap — 50 Hz frequency is shared; 230 V vs. 220 V nominal voltage difference requires verification of component ratings and nameplate. Safety test evidence must reference PS/IEC 60335-2-40; GB 4706.32 / CCC evidence alone does not satisfy PSQCA requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中等差距——50 Hz频率相同；230 V与220 V标称电压差需核实元器件额定值和铭牌。安全测试证据须引用PS/IEC 60335-2-40；仅凭GB 4706.32 / CCC证据不能满足PSQCA要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中等差距——50 Hz頻率相同；230 V與220 V標稱電壓差需核實元器件額定值和銘牌。安全測試證據須引用PS/IEC 60335-2-40；僅憑GB 4706.32 / CCC證據不能滿足PSQCA要求。
